creator: fn@pain.csrv.uidaho.edu
text:
root on khavrinen wrote...

   >Environment:
   
   	-current as of 5 December 1995 at 0900 UTC
   
   >Description:
   
   	dumpon doesn't work.
   
   >How-To-Repeat:
   
   	root@khavrinen(1)# dumpon /dev/wd1b
   	dumpon: sysctl: kern.dumpdev: No such file or directory

works for me.  i sup'd sys around 5-6PM PST8PDT Dec 6th.

i'm not setting any dump-related options in my kernel config; i just
use dumpon in /etc/rc*.
